headlines.headline: Halven Investments secures $250M contract with a global retailer

sentiment.reasoning: A $250M contract win represents a material positive contribution to the company's financial standing.

sentiment.reasoning: Facility upgrades are operational maintenance items that do not typically drive immediate financial performance changes.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
